texto: Right words are born in courage, which results from our struggle to make sense of our various predicaments. Cheer is what words are "trying to tell us/... It's native to the words/and what they want us always to know/even when it seems quite impossible to do.
explicacao: Citação de William Meredith sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Right words are born in courage, which results from our struggle to make sense of our various pre…” articula coragem, communication, poetry em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como poetry e speech.
